help.faq1a: You can reschedule a booking up to 24 hours before the appointment. Go to History, tap the booking, and choose "Reschedule".
help.faq2a: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before the booking. After that, a 50% cancellation fee applies.
help.faq3a: We use eco-friendly, hospital-grade cleaning products that are safe for children and pets.
help.faq4a: Go to Profile → Addresses → Add New Address. Enter your building, apartment, and city details.
help.faq5a: We accept all major credit/debit cards, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. Cash payment is available on request.
help.faq6a: Once your booking is confirmed, you will receive the cleaner's contact details via SMS and in-app notification.

authExtra.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
authExtra.checkEmail: Please check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.
authExtra.signupFailedMessage: Failed to create account. Please try again.
authExtra.validationEmail: Please enter a valid email address
authExtra.validationLogin: Enter a valid email or login
authExtra.validationPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters
authExtra.validationName: Full name must be at least 2 characters
authExtra.validationPhone: Please enter a valid phone number
authExtra.validationTerms: You must accept the Terms and Conditions
authExtra.terms1Body: By using SparklePro cleaning services, you agree to our professional cleaning standards and service delivery terms. Our team is committed to providing high-quality cleaning services for residential and commercial properties.
authExtra.terms2Body: All bookings must be made through our platform. We require at least 24 hours notice for booking confirmations and 4 hours notice for cancellations. Same-day bookings are subject to availability.
authExtra.terms3Body: Payment is due upon completion of services unless otherwise arranged. We accept various payment methods including credit cards and digital payments. All prices are subject to applicable taxes.
authExtra.terms4Body: Customers must provide secure access to the property during scheduled service times. SparklePro is not responsible for lost keys or access issues.
authExtra.terms5Body: We guarantee satisfaction with our cleaning services. If you're not satisfied, please contact us within 24 hours of service completion.
authExtra.terms6Body: SparklePro maintains comprehensive insurance coverage for all cleaning operations. Our liability is limited to the cost of the cleaning service.
authExtra.terms7Body: We respect your privacy and protect your personal information in accordance with applicable data protection laws.

10.richDescription: A comprehensive deep clean for your entire villa, ensuring every corner is spotless and sanitized. Perfect for moving in/out or a thorough seasonal refresh.

11.richDescription: Thorough deep cleaning for apartments of all sizes, focusing on detail and hygiene in every room.

12.richDescription: Professional exterior façade cleaning to restore the pristine look of your villa.

13.richDescription: Specialized cleaning for moving in or out, ensuring a completely fresh start. Every surface is treated so the next chapter begins spotlessly.

14.richDescription: Intensive cleaning to remove dust, debris, and residue after renovation or construction work.

15.richDescription: Focused deep cleaning of the entire kitchen area, including all appliances, cabinets, and surfaces.

16.richDescription: Complete deep cleaning of bathrooms including tiles, grout, fixtures, and all surfaces.
